_fixture_meta.description: Value persona exits INTC citing two consecutive quarters of below-thesis FCF generation and gross-margin compression — structural earnings-power break.
_fixture_meta.provenance: hand-authored 2026-06-22; INTC earnings-power decline is a well-documented public event; sanitised to remove any real-run context

thesis_status.reason: The original thesis was predicated on Intel sustaining 55%+ gross margins and recovering FCF to $10B+ annually by 2025. Q1 and Q2 2025 gross margins came in at 41% and 39% respectively, and FCF has been negative for three consecutive quarters. The competitive moat in leading-edge foundry has not materialised — TSMC process-node leadership has widened, not narrowed. The earnings-power assumption that underpinned the valuation is structurally broken, not cyclically weak.
